changelog:
🚀 Stable Release: Officially rolling out v1.2.1 with all recent performance improvements. 
🔹 Enhanced UI Transitions: Fluid 'Shared Axis' navigation across all main categories.
🔹 Memory Management: Automated memory flush to prevent crashes during long listening sessions.
🔹 Audio Support: Native support for high-quality audio formats (.opus, .flac).
🔹 Performance: Drastically reduced loading times for local library scanning.
